sql-history-purpose.label: What is SQL?
sql-history-purpose.summary: Overview of SQL, its history, and why it's important.

sketch-sql-definition.title: What is SQL?
sketch-sql-definition.bodyMarkdown: SQL stands for **Structured Query Language**. It is a standard programming language specifically designed for managing and manipulating data stored in relational databases. SQL allows users to create, read, update, and delete data efficiently.

sketch-sql-history.title: A Brief History of SQL
sketch-sql-history.bodyMarkdown: SQL was developed in the 1970s at IBM by Donald D. Chamberlin and Raymond F. Boyce. It was originally called SEQUEL (Structured English Query Language) and later became SQL. In 1986, SQL became a standard of the American National Standards Institute (ANSI), and later of the International Organization for Standardization (ISO).

sketch-sql-purpose.title: Why is SQL Important?
sketch-sql-purpose.bodyMarkdown: SQL is essential because it is the primary way to interact with relational databases, which are widely used in businesses, websites, and applications. SQL enables users to efficiently retrieve and manipulate large amounts of data, making it a foundational skill for data analysts, developers, and many IT professionals.

quiz-sql-definition.title: What does SQL stand for?
quiz-sql-definition.prompt: Choose the correct expansion of SQL.

quiz-sql-history.title: When was SQL first developed?
quiz-sql-history.prompt: Select the decade when SQL was first created.

quiz-sql-purpose.title: What are some uses of SQL?
quiz-sql-purpose.prompt: Select all correct uses of SQL.

quiz-sql-order-history.title: Order the events in SQL's history
quiz-sql-order-history.prompt: Arrange these events in the correct chronological order.

quiz-sql-basic-query.title: Write a basic SQL query
quiz-sql-basic-query.prompt: Write an SQL statement to select all columns from the 'students' table.
